title: Column Size Changed Event
description: Represents the event payload when the size of columns in a data table changes.

props.name: component
props.description: The data table component that emitted the event.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The HTML element associated with the event.

props.name: type
props.description: The type of column size change operation.

props.name: data
props.description: Additional data about the column size change.
